input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8771 [Automation] javac compile fails for org.apache.maven:maven-core:2.0.7; label=fails-javac-compile; body_chars=8015

risks: The reported failure is a version-specific Java API mismatch in existing tests, especially ArtifactResolutionException and ArtifactNotFoundException constructors, not missing setup.

Full MavenCli or DefaultMaven build execution can read settings/local repository and may try artifact or plugin resolution; keep generated coverage on deterministic local APIs or isolate any CLI execution with temporary files if such tests are added.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: maven-core 2.0.7 resolves its normal Plexus, ClassWorlds, Wagon, Maven module, and commons-cli dependencies transitively; meaningful tests can exercise CLI/version, diagnoser, lifecycle, and expression/documentation APIs without external services, Docker, or pre-added test dependencies.
